_comment: Golden canaries for known Fission parity gaps vs Ghidra. expect_status=mismatch locks the gap until a fix lands; then update the case to expect_status=match.

cases.name: cfg_parity__count_bits__gcc-O0
cases.notes: Frozen known gap: ghidra→fission cfg_parity edge_set

cases.name: cfg_parity__clamp__gcc-O0
cases.notes: Frozen known gap: ghidra→fission cfg_parity edge_set

cases.name: cfg_parity__saturating_add__gcc-O0
cases.notes: Frozen known gap: ghidra→fission cfg_parity edge_set

cases.name: pcode_parity__count_bits__gcc-O0
cases.notes: Conservative known-gap lock: strict pcode full equality fails on LOAD/STORE address-space id encoding (Ghidra vs Fission). Opcode-name normalization is covered by unit tests, not a free match.
